case_title: EPSTEIN LEWIS VS KAISER SANDS AND GRAVEL CO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EPSTEIN LEWIS AS TO DEFENDANT KAISER SANDS AND GRAVEL CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
CERT. RECEIPT TO KAISER SAND & GRAVEL RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EPSTEIN LEWIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAISER SANDS AND GRAVEL CO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,513.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
